sections.markdown:
- Activity: Morning Run
- Started: 2026-01-22 05:44
- Distance: 5 km
- Moving time: 32:29
- Elapsed time: 32:29
- Elevation gain: 87.2 m
- Average heart rate: 163.8 bpm
- Max heart rate: 184 bpm
- Average watts: 196.8 W
- Average speed: 9.3 km/h

- Apple Health recorded `240` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `163.9 bpm`, ranging from `94.0` to `183.5 bpm`.
- First-half average HR was `155.7 bpm` and second-half average HR was `172.0 bpm` (+16.3 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `170.5 spm`, with a working range of `120.0` to `206.7 spm` after excluding `1` start-stop outlier below `100 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `169.1 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `171.9 spm` (+2.8 spm), which looks mechanically stable.

- Strava moving pace averaged `6:28 /km` across `5.029 km` in `32:29` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `6:41 /km` and second-half pace was `6:14 /km` (-27 s/km), so pace picked up through the second half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `163.8 bpm` average and `184 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `156.0 bpm` in the first half and `172.2 bpm` in the second (+16.2 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `32:29` out of `32:29` elapsed (100.0%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `5` stop segments and `0.5%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `90.4 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `40.2 m` and `63.6 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `39.8 m` in the first half and `50.6 m` in the second, so most of the climbing landed later.
